body_txt: It's often said that everyone has different tastes. What one person finds delicious , another might find repulsive . But there are certain foods that are universally disliked and considered almost inedible. Keyword being "Almost". They are the Only One Who Likes Spam . The ones with such... unique palates that they're able to consume, and even enjoy, food (often a Stock "Yuck!" or Foreign Queasine type) that everyone else finds disgusting. The food this character likes that everyone else hates may even be their Trademark Favorite Food . This kind of character is often a Big Eater who isn't very picky, and often enjoys food from a Cordon Bleugh Chef , or is even able to stomach food of a Lethal Chef . See also Does Not Like Spam , Extreme Omnivore , and Bizarre Taste in Food . Compare fellow child of Odd Reaction Out , Only One Finds It Fun , which is this trope applied to an activity rather than a food.
